steps.title: Find the smaller side length
steps.content:
A side length $70\%$ shorter is $30\%$ of the original side length.
$$40(1-0.70)=40(0.30)=12$$

steps.title: Use the inverse scale
steps.content:
The same actual distance is now shown by a side length of $12$ inches instead of $40$ inches, so each inch represents more miles by the inverse factor.
$$14\cdot \frac{40}{12}=14\cdot \frac{10}{3}=\frac{140}{3}\sim 46.67$$

steps.title: Choose the closest value
steps.content: The value $46.67$ miles per inch is closest to $48.67$ among the choices. The answer is D.
